title: Cobblemon IMPACT
description: Welcome to Cobblemon IMPACT, the most EPIC Cobblemon experience you'll ever find! On this server you can find anything from the holy Bidoof, to a puny wild Arceus! I hope you have a great time on this awesome server! HAIL BIDOOF!
body: Welcome to Cobblemon IMPACT, the most EPIC Cobblemon experience you'll ever find! On this server you can find anything from the holy Bidoof, to a puny wild Arceus! I hope you have a great time on this awesome server! HAIL BIDOOF!
